results.title: Fed interest rate decision April 2026: Fed holds rates steady amid dissent
Federal Reserve Board - Implementation Note issued April 29, 2026
Fed meeting recap: Powell to stay on board – Trump's legal attacks have 'left me no choice'
US Fed holds rates steady, Powell to remain on its board | Business and Economy News | Al Jazeera
Federal Reserve leaves interest rates unchanged as Powell's chairmanship nears end

summary: FOMC held rates at 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29, 2026 with an 8-4 split. Powell staying as governor despite Trump pressure. Kevin Warsh advancing as next Fed chair nominee. Easing bias retained but contested.
